summary: Hand-added Tier-1 --cookie-file persistent root flag (loads a flat-JSON Medium session cookie) during the keyless build.
reason: The keyless (Tier 0) fork hand-adds an optional Tier-1 path so a user-supplied session cookie unlocks member full bodies. The generator never emits a credential flag, so this customization lives only in this fork's root.go. Recorded retroactively (originally commit b8deed4, 2026-06-16) so a future reprint would preserve it, and so its MCP-exposure fix (medium-reader-mcp-block-cookie-file) has documented provenance.
validated_outcome: Flag present and functional at Tier 1; build, vet, and tests green at Tier 0 with MEDIUM_API_KEY unset.
